label: namely 동격
hint: 명사 뒤 namely + 명사로 구체적으로 바꿔 말함 ('즉')

label: 삽입구
hint: I think/of course 등을 문장 중간에 끼워 넣음 (He is, I think, right)

label: 주석절
hint: as it were/so to speak 등으로 '말하자면' 태도를 덧붙이는 절

label: 절대구문 (격식)
hint: That said로 '그렇긴 하지만' 앞말 일부 인정 후 전환 (격식)

label: This done
hint: This done으로 '이 일이 끝나자' 독립분사구문 (This done, he left)

label: but + 가정 함축
hint: would V, but ~로 뒤에 못 하는 이유를 들어 조건 함축 (I would, but I'm busy)

label: as it stands
hint: as it stands로 '현 상태로는' 함축 조건 (As it stands, we fail)

label: whether 주어절
hint: Whether ~ 명사절이 문장 주어 (Whether he comes is unclear)

label: 관계사절 주어
hint: What ~ 명사절이 문장 주어 (What matters is honesty)

label: 융합 관계사
hint: whoever/whatever가 선행사를 포함 (Whoever comes is welcome)

label: 역의사분열문
hint: That is what ~로 앞에 강조어를 두는 역의사분열문 (That is what I want)

label: 부사 강조 분열
hint: It was + 부사구 + that으로 부사 강조 분열문 (It was there that ...)

label: 이유 강조 분열
hint: It was because ~ that으로 이유를 강조하는 분열문

label: 중간태
hint: 능동형이지만 수동 의미 (The book sells well = 잘 팔린다)

label: 능격동사
hint: break/open 등 자동·타동 양용 (The door opened / He opened it)

label: tough 구문
hint: 주어가 to부정사의 의미상 목적어 (He is hard to please = 그를 만족시키기 어렵다)

label: 인상 구문 seem
hint: that절 주어가 주절 주어로 인상 (S seems to V = It seems that S V)

label: 인상 구문 believe
hint: that절 주어가 주절 목적어로 인상 (believe him to be honest)

label: ECM 구문
hint: 목적어가 to부정사의 의미상 주어로 격 표시 (expect him to win)

label: 소절
hint: 목적어+보어가 주술관계를 이루는 소절 (consider him honest)

label: 결과 구문
hint: 동사+목적어+형용사로 결과 상태 (paint it red = 빨갛게 칠하다)

label: 동족목적어
hint: 자동사가 같은 어원의 목적어를 취함 (live a happy life)

label: Should it ~ 격식 도치
hint: if 생략 후 Should 문두 격식 조건 도치 (Should it rain, ...)

label: recommend that 가정법
hint: recommend that + 주어 + 동사원형 (recommend that he go)

label: order that 가정법
hint: order/demand that + 주어 + 동사원형 (order that he leave)

label: It is imperative that
hint: It is imperative that + 주어 + 동사원형 (imperative that he be there)

label: It is vital that
hint: It is vital that + 주어 + 동사원형 (vital that she attend)

label: on condition that
hint: on condition that + 절로 '~라는 조건이면' (on condition that you pay)

label: 관계절 중첩
hint: 한 명사를 관계절이 겹겹이 수식 (the man that I met that lives here)

label: 전치사 동반 이동
hint: 전치사가 관계사와 함께 앞으로 이동 (the man of whom I spoke)

label: 전치사 후치
hint: 전치사를 관계절 끝에 남김 (the man whom I spoke to)

label: 비정형절 주어
hint: To부정사가 문장 주어 (To err is human = 실수는 인간적이다)

label: 동명사절 주어
hint: 동명사가 문장 주어 (Seeing is believing = 보는 것이 믿는 것)

label: 결과 부정사
hint: to부정사가 결과를 나타냄 (grew up to be = 자라서 ~가 되었다)

label: only to 결과
hint: only to V로 예상 밖 실망스러운 결과 (woke up only to find)

label: never to 결과
hint: never to V로 '~하여 다시는 못 ~하다' 부정 결과 (left never to return)

label: 독립부정사
prompt: to be honest 등 문장 수식
hint: to be honest 등 독립부정사가 문장 전체 수식 (To be honest, ...)

label: so as to
hint: so as to + 동사원형으로 '~하기 위해' 목적 (so as to pass)

label: in order to
hint: in order to + 동사원형으로 '~하기 위해' 목적 (in order to win)

label: in order that
hint: in order that + 주어 + may/can으로 목적절 (in order that he may pass)

label: too ~ only to
hint: too + 형용사 + only to V로 강조된 실망 결과

label: or rather 동격
hint: or rather로 앞말을 '더 정확히는'으로 정정 부연 (a friend, or rather an ally)

label: 다중 종속절
hint: that절 안에 because절 등 종속절이 겹겹이 중첩되는 복합 구조

label: such as to
hint: such as to + 동사원형으로 '~할 정도의' 정도·결과 (such as to surprise)

label: so as not to
hint: so as not to + 동사원형으로 '~하지 않으려고' 부정 목적 (so as not to wake)

label: It is I who
hint: It is I who + 동사로 주어를 강조하는 분열문 (It is I who am right)

label: have it done (격식)
hint: have + 목적어 + p.p.로 '~을 ~되게 하다' 사역 수동 (have it done)

label: Such was 도치
hint: Such was + 주어 + that으로 정도 강조 도치 (Such was his joy that ...)

label: perish the thought
hint: Perish the thought로 '그런 생각 마' 동사원형 관용 가정법

label: What happened was
hint: What happened was that ~로 사건을 강조하는 의사분열문

label: Not only had he
hint: Not only 뒤 조동사+주어 도치 (Not only had he lied, but ...)

label: Never before had I
hint: Never before 뒤 had+주어 부정부사 도치 (Never before had I seen)

label: No sooner had I
hint: No sooner had 주어 p.p. than ~로 '~하자마자' 도치 (No sooner had I left than ...)

label: Hardly had I
hint: Hardly had 주어 p.p. when ~로 '~하자마자' 도치 (Hardly had I sat when ...)

label: Scarcely had we
hint: Scarcely had 주어 p.p. when ~로 '~하자마자' 도치

label: Little did she know
hint: Little 뒤 did+주어 부정 도치 (Little did she know = 그녀는 몰랐다)

label: Only after did
hint: Only after ~ 뒤 조동사+주어 도치 (Only after he left did I know)

label: Not once did he
hint: Not once 뒤 did+주어 부정 도치 (Not once did he complain)

label: On no occasion did
hint: On no occasion 뒤 did+주어 부정구 도치

label: In no circumstances will
hint: In no circumstances 뒤 조동사+주어 부정구 도치

label: Not for a moment did
hint: Not for a moment 뒤 did+주어 부정구 도치

label: Rarely have we seen
hint: Rarely 뒤 have+주어+p.p. 빈도부정 도치 (Rarely have we seen)

label: So great was the
hint: So + 형용사 + was + 주어 보어 도치 (So great was the noise that ...)

label: Such was his anger
hint: Such + was + 명사 보어 도치 (Such was his anger that ...)

label: Down came the rain
hint: 방향 부사가 문두로 가면 동사+주어 도치 (Down came the rain)

label: Here comes the bus
hint: Here/There 뒤 동사+명사주어 장소부사 도치 (Here comes the bus)

label: Should anyone ask
hint: if 생략 후 Should 문두 조건 도치 (Should anyone ask, ...)

label: Had it not been
hint: if had not been에서 if 생략 가정법 도치 (Had it not been for ...)

label: Were it not for
hint: if it were not for에서 if 생략 가정법 도치 (Were it not for ...)

label: I insist that he
hint: insist that + 주어 + 동사원형 주장동사 가정법 (insist that he go)

label: They demand that
hint: demand that + 주어 + 동사원형 요구동사 가정법 (demand that he leave)

label: I propose that we
hint: propose that + 주어 + 동사원형 제안동사 가정법 (propose that we wait)

label: It is essential that
hint: It is essential that + 주어 + 동사원형 이성판단 가정법 (essential that he be)

label: It is crucial that
hint: It is crucial that + 주어 + 동사원형 이성판단 가정법 (crucial that she attend)

label: as it were
hint: as it were로 '말하자면/이를테면' 관용 가정법 (a living fossil, as it were)

label: if need be
hint: if need be로 '필요하다면' 동사원형 관용 가정법

label: Be it so
hint: Be it so로 '그렇다 할지라도' 동사원형 양보 가정법

label: It was here that
hint: It was here that ~로 장소 부사를 강조하는 분열문

label: It is you who
hint: It is you who + 동사로 주어를 강조하는 분열문

label: What I need is
hint: What I need is ~로 목적어를 강조하는 의사분열문

label: The one who did
hint: The one who ~ is로 사람을 강조하는 wh-분열문

label: All I want is
hint: All I want is ~로 '~뿐'을 강조하는 all 분열문

label: The reason why is
hint: The reason why ~ is로 이유를 강조하는 분열문

label: Having been told
hint: Having been + p.p.로 완료수동 분사구문 (Having been told, ...)

label: Not knowing what
hint: Not + 분사로 부정 분사구문 (Not knowing what to do, ...)

label: Seen from afar
hint: 과거분사로 시작하는 수동 분사구문 (Seen from afar, ...)

label: weather permitting
hint: weather permitting으로 '날씨가 허락하면' 독립 분사구문

label: frankly speaking
hint: Frankly speaking으로 '솔직히 말하면' 무인칭 독립분사구문

label: Having finished work
hint: Having + p.p.로 완료 분사구문 (Having finished work, ...)

label: his arms folded
hint: 명사 + p.p.로 독립 주격 구문 (with) his arms folded

label: night falling fast
hint: 명사 + 현재분사로 독립 주격 구문 (Night falling fast, ...)

label: inasmuch as
hint: inasmuch as로 '~인 한/~이므로' 이유 종속접속사 (문어체)

label: albeit
hint: albeit으로 '비록 ~이지만' 양보 접속사 (albeit slowly)

label: notwithstanding that
hint: notwithstanding (that)으로 '~에도 불구하고' 양보 접속사

label: lest he should
hint: lest + 주어 + should V로 '~하지 않도록' 목적 종속접속사

label: on condition that
hint: on condition that + 절로 '~라는 조건이면' 조건 접속사

label: Much as I like
hint: Much as + 주어 + 동사로 '~하지만' 양보 도치 접속사 (Much as I like it)

label: No matter how hard
hint: No matter how + 형용사/부사로 '아무리 ~해도' 양보 부사절

label: Be that as it may
hint: Be that as it may로 '그렇다 하더라도' 양보 관용절

label: Come what may
hint: Come what may로 '무슨 일이 있어도' 양보 가정법 관용
